programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.desc: Some of the Wall Street financial instruments that magnified the economic crisis; an officer talks about Osama bin Laden's narrow escape in Tora Bora, Afghanistan; the race to develop and produce an electric car.

programme.desc: Asa is chastised for refusing to share her "real" life on camera; Golnesa faces difficult truths about her rheumatoid arthritis; a heartbreaking meltdown leads to an unexpected moment.

programme.desc: Reza and Adam throw an anniversary celebration, during which Shervin reveals he is an exclusive relationship with Annalise; Shervin hosts a party and invites Reza and GG; GG apologizes to Adam while avoiding Reza; MJ and Reza visit her father.

programme.desc: Reza and Adam explore both surrogacy and adoption; GG introduces her Jewish boyfriend to her Muslim parents; the Shahs are excited about their trip to Israel; after a wild night out, MJ's friends wonder whether she's ready to be a mother.

programme.desc: Asa begins to feel more isolated from the crew; Mike decides it's time to move forward with his love life; MJ hears some gossip about Shervin; GG's roller-skating party turns into an interrogation as Shervin confronts the rumors about him.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El principal sospechoso en una investigación de asesinato del NCIS es una amiga de Gibbs, Phillip Brooks (Don Lake), que conoció en un sitio de citas. Además, Sloane tiene un admirador secreto en el Día de San Valentín.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el suicidio de un oficial de la Marina retirado, que dejó una moneda rara y valiosa en el Museo Nacional de la Marina. El equipo se imagina a sí mismo en la historia de su vida para reconstruir cómo la moneda quedó en su poder.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga la muerte de un oficial de la Marina asesinado de la misma manera que sus padres hace una década, se topan con un contenedor de almacenamiento lleno de casas de muñecas que muestran recreaciones de escenas de asesinatos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo busca respuestas cuando el cuerpo de un respetado técnico de la Marina, en las reservas es encontrado flotando en un lago donde se lleva a cabo un evento comunitario popular.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando Karen y Jimmy son tomados como rehenes en un restaurante después de que el robo de una joyería sale mal, intentan mantener a los otros clientes a salvo de los ladrones.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo intenta verificar la identidad de Joe Smith (Christopher Lloyd), quien afirma haber servido en el U.S.S. Arizona durante el ataque a Pearl Harbor, y quiere ser enterrado allí después de su muerte.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras Hotch lucha por su vida debido a las complicaciones del apuñalamiento a manos de George Foyet, también conocido como "The Reaper", experimenta visiones de su difunta esposa, Haley, y su némesis, Foyet.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC investiga a las víctimas de posibles asesinatos rituales en Utah, las pistas los llevan a creer que el sujeto que buscan podría estar fascinado con los juicios de brujas de Salem.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de una serie de estrangulamientos en Boston, la UAC busca un sospechoso al que le guste guardar recuerdos de las víctimas, y el equipo se pregunta si un vínculo común con las víctimas podría llevarlos al culpable.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de encontrar un cuerpo en el sitio de prueba de vehículos aéreos no tripulados, el equipo de NCIS debe determinar si la muerte fue un asesinato o un accidente.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Luego de que Torres y Bishop sean víctimas de un atropello y fuga, Torres lucha por su vida en la UCI.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El principal sospechoso en una investigación de asesinato del NCIS es una amiga de Gibbs, Phillip Brooks (Don Lake), que conoció en un sitio de citas. Además, Sloane tiene un admirador secreto en el Día de San Valentín.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el suicidio de un oficial de la Marina retirado, que dejó una moneda rara y valiosa en el Museo Nacional de la Marina. El equipo se imagina a sí mismo en la historia de su vida para reconstruir cómo la moneda quedó en su poder.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/05/2013. Chefs and restauranteurs Fred Morin and Dave McMillan, of Joe Beef’s, take us across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 4/24/2016. Anthony Bourdain explores the Philippines at Christmas and eats at beloved chicken chain Jollibee, samples sisig and indulges in the popular dessert halo-halo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/1/2016. Anthony Bourdain visits the iconic Old Town Ale House, eats mapo tofu in Chinatown and shares a home-cooked meal with rapper Lupe Fiasco.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/8/2016. On the island of Naxos, Anthony Bourdain dives to a sunken shipwreck, drinks raki with locals and samples cuisine fresh off a fishing boat.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/15/2016. Anthony Bourdain visits the Crow Reservation, hunts with podcast host Joe Rogan and eats dinner at Butte institution Lydia’s Supper Club.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/14/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia: Myanmar, the city of Yangon and the remote Bagan temple.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/21/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Koreatown in Los Angeles, where he finds a tight-knit community marked by the 1992 Rodney King riots.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/28/2013. Colombia has changed immensely over the past 10 years. Anthony Bourdain explores several regions of the country, from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier checks his professional dignity at the door when he becomes the cohost of a mindless morning TV show with his agent, Bebe.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier learns that comely neighbor Regan Shaw has recently become available again, but is shy about approaching her because his previous encounters with her resulted in him looking foolish.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier's delight at having his caricature displayed in a famous local landmark dissolves once he sees the unflattering portrait.

programme.title: La joven mancornadora

programme.title: Alazán y enamorado

programme.title: Aquí Está Tu Enamorado

programme.title: El embajador del miedo

programme.title: Una propuesta indecorosa

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pelo de perro

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El sospechoso principal tenía un historial criminal y su licencia de conducir se encontró en la escena del crimen de un brutal homicidio doble.

programme.desc: Un guardia de seguridad desapareció de su puesto sin dejar rastro. Sus restos fueron encontrados un año después en un campamento lejano.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2002, el director de la funeraria, Lonnie Turner, fue encontrado muerto a tiros. Su hijo, Lonnie júnior, se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, particularmente después de que se descubriera que el asesinato se cometió con su arma.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.desc: Peter battles to save a mum-to-be and her unborn calf. There’s a ‘cuteness overload’ when Julian meets Finlay and his beloved hamster, Christopher Nibbles. Bella, the much-loved rescue sausage dog, needs life-saving surgery. Can Peter save her?

programme.title: Dogs with Jobs
programme.desc: Kavik: Call Of The Wild (Vancouver, B.C.) - Kavik, half-husky, half-wolf, is about to undertake the canine acting role of a lifetime – playing the lead in a TV version of Call of the Wild.

programme.title: Pet Obsessed: Bad Bois
programme.desc: Whatcha gonna do when they come for you?

programme.title: Pet Heroes
programme.desc: A Police Dog's fast actions and quick thinking stop an armed conflict from escalating out of control. And a young autistic boy struggling to cope with his surroundings makes an important new friend.

programme.title: Pet Obsessed: Pup'N Iron
programme.desc: These pets are training to be the top paw-formers.

programme.title: The Super Retriever Series Crown Championship
programme.desc: The Super Retriever Series Crown Championship showcases the best in hunting retrievers in the Semifinal competition and dogs on the SRS Super dock in the final competition.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: Inspector Herchy Boal teams up with the police to attend a property near Birmingham suspected of puppy farming. Tragically, for one puppy it was already too late, but she manages to rescue another 37 including 8 expectant mothers.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: Beverley Mahood meets with the Sweeney family, who are looking for another sweet puppy to complete their family. The Sweeneys visit - the Labrador Retriever, the Cavalier King Charles Spaniel and the Border Collie. The children fall in love with all …

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Greedy terrier Wesley has taken his food obsession too far and eaten an oven glove. Peter operates to try and remove the blockage and save Wesley's life.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: A 4-week-old lamb is rushed in to see Peter. After being unwell recently, it suffered a prolapse, and Peter thinks the solution might just lie in the practice's kitchen. Julian attends to a dog that's been kicked in the face by a horse.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: Beverley Mahood meets Mycal and Amie, a couple who are looking for a dog to fit in with their active lifestyle. While they visit the Dogue de Bordeaux, Great Danes, and Boxers, Mycal shows his sensitive side.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Chihuahua mommy overprotective of plastic baby dog; Barney training for the big fight; Corky, the cat and the neighborhood squirrel have a face off through the kitchen glass door.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People

programme.title: Animals Unleashed
programme.desc: A cat shows its ball skills, a talkative dog, and a stampeding herd of birds takes a walk on the farm. And in our Top 5, a birdwatcher gets too close for comfort and ends up paying the price.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: In Thornton Heath, South London, Inspector Nick Wheelhouse is called out to see three adult mastiffs and nine puppies who are all drastically underweight

programme.title: Tian Shan: Land Of Bears And Horses
programme.desc: Spring is in the Tian Shan, the 'Mountains of Heaven' in the south of Kazakhstan, in Asia, and two brown bear cubs and their mother have just left their den.

programme.title: Wild Medicine - Animals' Superpowers
programme.desc: Animals are true superheroes. They have superpowers that we humans can only dream of. Some grow back their limbs after they have lost them. Others let huge bones grow on their heads at a rapid speed.

programme.title: Wild Sardinia
programme.desc: Sardinia has always been the epitome of pure wilderness, an emerald of volcanic origin in the Mediterranean. 1900 metres of coastline and an infinite maze of offshore islands.

programme.title: Wild Skagerrak
programme.desc: The strait that connects the North Sea with the Baltic, with depths of over 700 metres, is notorious for its dangerously strong currents. But currents also mean food and therefore nourishment for the large swarms of fish that inhabit the region.

programme.title: Wild Switzerland
programme.desc: Gentle, green meadows, rugged rock faces, mysterious lakes, dense forests, tall mountains, low-lying river deltas, quietly meandering mountain streams, and smack dab in the middle, a unique fauna - THIS is Switzerland!

programme.title: The Forgotten Forests Of Malaysia
programme.desc: Malaysia boasts some of the most ancient forests on the planet. These are biological treasure troves; home to an unparalleled wealth of life.

programme.title: The Last Horns Of Africa
programme.desc: With unprecedented access, The Last Horns Of Africa is a gripping and intimate look at the current rhino poaching war raging across Africa.

programme.title: The Last Reef
programme.desc: The Last Reef is an uplifting, inspirational experience capturing one of nature's more vibrant and diverse wonderlands. These biodiversity hot spots are as vital to our lives as the rainforests.

programme.title: The Lembeh Strait Walking Fish
programme.desc: Whale sharks, manta rays, and other big fish were once common in the narrow Lembeh Strait in Indonesia, but overfishing has long since eradicated the larger species.

programme.title: The Living Sea
programme.desc: From the tropical waters of Palau in the South Pacific, to the barreling waves of Oahu's North Shore and Nova Scotia's major tidal swings, The Living Sea celebrates the beauty, power and importance of the ocean.

programme.title: Search for the Ghost Bears
programme.desc: Our film journey begins in Alaska's west. We are hoping to find glacier bears in the glacial regions of the Katmai National Park on the Douglas River.

programme.title: Magic Lakes
programme.desc: At 117 square kilometres, the Müritz is the largest lake on German territory, but it's far from the only one in the north east of the country. Even the Mecklenburg Lake District, between Waren and Feldberg, contains around 2000 lakes alone.

programme.title: Mantises - Masters Of Deception
programme.desc: They are killers. They kill with unbelievable precision. They fight Kung Fu style and are seen in Japan as a symbol of vigilance - the mantises.

programme.title: First Things First
programme.desc: FIRST THINGS FIRST is a daily sports talk show hosted by Nick Wright, Chris Broussard and Kevin Wildes. Wright started his broadcasting career as a critically acclaimed radio host and is joined by longtime sports reporter and commentator Chris Broussard.

programme.title: Breakfast Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by Craig Carton, Mark Schlereth, and Danny Parkins, Breakfast Ball is a fun and lively morning show discussing the biggest sports stories of the day.

programme.title: The Facility
programme.desc: Hosted by Emmanuel Acho, LeSean McCoy, James Jones, and Chase Daniel, The Facility takes you inside the biggest sports topics from the athlete’s perspective.

programme.title: The Herd with Colin Cowherd
programme.desc: THE HERD WITH COLIN COWHERD is a three-hour sports television show hosted by Colin Cowherd and Jason McIntyre. Cowherd is a veteran broadcaster with over 20 years of experience in the sports television and radio field.

programme.desc: Leaving the simple life in rural West Sumatera, Yuda must undergo merantau, the traditional rite of passage in which a young man must leave his family’s home to make it on his own.

programme.title: The Raid 2 (Subtitled)

programme.title: House of Flying Daggers
programme.desc: Mei is an exotic, beautiful blind dancer, associated with a dangerous revolutionary gang, known as the House of Flying Daggers. Captured by officers of the decadent Tang Dynasty, Mei finds herself both threatened. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Anna Vincenzo's, un restaurante familiar en Boca Raton, Florida. Se entera de que el obstinado dueño no acepta el cambio. Después de que se ignoran sus ideas, Ramsay se marcha.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Fleming, un restaurante danés en Miami. El obstinado dueño no quiere actualizar el lugar y Ramsay descubre algo en la hielera que lo lleva a cerrar el restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita el Pabellón Español en Nueva Jersey. Descubre que un par de hermanos en disputa están llevando el restaurante al suelo. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay llega a un restaurante endeudado propiedad de dos ex meseras y las cosas están tan mal que Ramsay realiza una intervención para abordar el tema del liderazgo.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: PJ's Steakhouse se está muriendo por la falta de control de la gerencia en la calidad de la comida, con un dueño un poco grosero y su esposo, el copropietario, sentados en el bar bebiendo todo el día.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay hace el viaje a Carlstadt, Nueva Jersey, para visitar Grasshopper Also, un restaurante que ha visto días mejores. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Viajando al North End de Boston, el chef Ramsay pasa una semana en Davide, un restaurante italiano mal administrado por hermanos enemistados. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Providence, Rhode Island, para visitar DownCity, un restaurante con un avance detenido por un propietario obstinado y de mal genio. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Bridgeport, Connecticut, el chef Ramsay visita el Café Tavolini. Dos propietarios indiferentes observan cómo su restaurante se va a la ruina . Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Sherman Oaks, California, para rescatar a un restaurante francés del peligro mientras los dueños, hermano y hermana, se pelean por el restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Durante su visita a Los Ángeles, el chef Ramsay se detiene en Capri. Este restaurante italiano está sucio, sirve comida terrible y está desordenado, todo gracias a un par de gemelos muy flojos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Pasadena, California, para poner en forma un restaurante especializado en cocina caribeña. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Abajo, en Big Easy, el chef Ramsay intenta inyectar algo de vida en un restaurante sureño acosado por una decoración y menús atroces. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay regresa a algunos de los restaurantes para ver si siguieron su consejo. Los restaurantes que visita incluyen Mojito, The Junction y Bazzini. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a windy Kansas night in 1995, a mysterious fire swept through the home of a prominent doctor. In the debris, investigators found evidence which told them how the fire started.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young woman disappeared, police feared she was the latest victim in a string of similar crimes. A pair of bloody gloves, unique tire tracks and ordinary pine needles provided investigators with some extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Survivors of Nazi atrocities recognized Archbishop Trifa, former head of the Romanian Orthodox Church in America, as having directed a bloody attack against Jews during World War II. He was deported in 1984 and died three years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial rapist is on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an elderly couple died in a suspicious house fire, their son became the prime suspect. Investigators turned to forensic science to determine if the fire had been set deliberately, or if it was an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When convenience store employee Wanda Mason is found dead, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's security camera. But the image of the killer is so degraded it seems impossible to positively identify him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experienced the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derailed while crossing Alabama's Big Bayou Canot bridge. 47 passengers and crew were killed; scores more were injured.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water. The husband, however, had no recollection of the crime. A jury would have to decide between evidence and the mysteries of the mind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Foul play is suspected when Fort Worth factory worker Glenda Furch disappears after completing her shift.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On May 20, 2001, Carrie Nelson was beaten to death while working alone in a park office. The case went unsolved for six years. Finally, police found a match with DNA samples gathered from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue — a flaw on a mailing envelope — exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, the dead bodies of Joan Rogers and her two teenage daughters were found floating in Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young girl was discovered on isolated farmland near Delano, California. She had no ID, but police found mailbox keys in the pocket of her jeans. With no other clues, they checked the mailboxes of every apartment building in Delano.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When investigators found Bruce Miller dead in the office of his junkyard business, the crime scene was almost pristine. But when a computer forensics expert examined computers owned by the victim's wife and her lover, he found all the evidence needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Casino security cameras tracked a young woman's movements until shortly before she disappeared. She was never seen again, but through the evidence she left behind, she was able to tell investigators what happened to her and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after organizing a workers' strike, a union official is executed in his home. Neither his wife nor anyone in the neighborhood hear any gunshots. It takes a forensic sound test, an electron microscope and a nightgown to explain why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray was charged in her husband's death. Her son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school, studied all of the evidence and, eventually, discovered the truth of what really happened between his parents.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, the body of a young woman was discovered in an Ohio river. Most of the evidence had been washed away, but the victim's 6-year-old son unwittingly told investigators all they needed to know — without saying a word. The clue was in his genes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1998, a Maryland murder mystery performance turns into a real whodunit when the badly burned body of Stephen Hricko is discovered in his hotel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home. The killer then sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The device is so powerful that it embedded shrapnel in houses across the street. The bomber had not only knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Young Navajos in the Southwest were dying at an alarming rate. The tribe's medicine men provided investigators with a critical clue that would lead halfway around the world to a most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A police officer accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide. Investigators say it was murder — that it was physically impossible for the woman to have shot herself.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: Lucy decides that Ricky needs an agent to negotiate more money and cut down on his fruitless personal appearances, so she appoints herself. Her fast talking, no-nonsense actions result in the studio canceling Ricky's contract.

programme.desc: Although Ricky is having lunch with Richard Widmark, he refuses to introduce Lucy because she has become a legend around Hollywood for her crazy escapades.

programme.desc: Ricky finds Lucy exhausted after a trying day with little Ricky and insists it is time their son started nursery school. Lucy's protests are overridden and Ricky takes young Ricky to nursery school, but the baby comes down with tonsillitis.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En septiembre de 1997, un equipo de hombres cubiertos con máscaras asaltó una instalación de autos blindados en Los Ángeles, y escaparon con 18,9 millones de dólares, el mayor golpe en la historia de robos de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En junio de 1973, una niña fue secuestrada de un parque estatal en el río Misuri mientras acampaba con su familia. Pasaron varios meses sin tener pistas, pero luego un agente del FBI tomó un interés particular en el caso.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En junio del 2000, dos hombres armados robaron un banco en Seattle, Washington, y huyeron a pie mientras varios oficiales los perseguían.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Dos parejas se encontraron en la misma isla desierta y paradisíaca. Pero solo una de ellas salió con vida. Buck Walker y Stephanie Stearns llegaron a Hawái en el Sea Wind, el cual le pertenecía a la pareja desaparecida, Mac y Muff Graham.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Esta es la historia de la primera captura del FBI de un terrorista internacional libanés. En junio de 1985, el terrorista y sus cuatro cómplices secuestraron el avión de una aerolínea poco después de despegar de Beirut.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un fin de semana del Día del Trabajador se convirtió en una pesadilla de homicidios mientras una ola de crímenes tenía aterrorizado a todo el país.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Vagaba por las calles de la ciudad de Nueva York llevando solo piyamas y una bata de baño, pero el FBI estaba convencido de que Vince Gigante, el reputado jefe de la familia genovesa del crimen, no estaba loco.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un cuerpo en llamas en un callejón oscuro arroja luz sobre un asesino. Sus compañeros en el crimen contarían la historia, si hubieran sobrevivido.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Después de que un criminal con trayectoria cometiera un homicidio vehicular en Nueva Orleans, los agentes del FBI lo rastrearon por medio de sus hábitos y adicciones.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Los residentes de la pequeña ciudad de Noel, Misuri, quedaron sorprendidos cuando uno de sus bancos fue robado.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Filadelfia, una lucha despiadada para hacerse con el poder condujo a una guerra de la mafia a gran escala. La familia del crimen de la mafia local se dividió en dos mientras los jóvenes y los mayores se enfrentaban a muerte.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El 3 de febrero de 1990, una niña huyó de la casa de su madre y desapareció sin dejar rastro. Su madre esperaba que la policía de Pasadena, en Texas, pudiera encontrarla antes de que fuera muy tarde.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.desc: A wonderful, song-filled feature about an unlovable, murdered mutt (Burt Reynolds) who returns to Earth to do a good deed. When he adopts an orphan girl who can communicate with animals and help lead him to his killer.

programme.title: All Dogs Go To Heaven 2
programme.desc: Charlie and Itchy are back! Those lovable mutts from the treasured Family hit "All Dogs Go To Heaven" return for an all-new Animated Musical Adventure. Features the voices of Charlie Sheen, Dom DeLuise and Sheena Easton.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers arrive at Castle Nocturnia hoping to find the key to defeating the Nightmare King, but the castle won't reveal its secrets easily.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz

programme.title: Friends Heartlake Stories
programme.desc: When Zack and his mom move into the corner apartment building, they disrupt the calm, so Zack and resident Evelyn try and make the neighbors happy again.

programme.title: Friends Heartlake Stories
programme.desc: Andrea and Olivia find themselves in the middle of a turf war when a local farmer and local florist blame each other for their crop's failures.

programme.title: Friends Heartlake Stories
programme.desc: A day at Wet Wallop Waterpark turns sour when Olivia, Emma, and Stephanie turn on one another, while also having to face a bully lifeguard.

programme.title: Friends Heartlake Stories
programme.desc: Our five friends are getting ready to head off on an amazing adventure, to fulfill their lifelong dreams. They just need to pass their final exams first.

programme.title: Friends The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Feeling the pressure of attending a new school, Zac attempts to live up to the expectations of his classmates and hurts a new friend in the process.

programme.title: Friends The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Reeling from a failed science experiment, Autumn hosts a sleepover at her barn, unaware that the place may be haunted...

programme.title: Friends The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Expressing her anger through art, Liann draws a rude picture of Nova. But when the picture gets out, Liann must track it down before Nova sees it.

programme.title: Friends The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Unaware that they have the answers to each other's problems, Nova fails to make a popular video game while Autumn struggles to help a puppy in need.

programme.title: Friends The Next Chapter
programme.desc: When all of the dogs escape from the Adoption Center, Nova recruits her friends to track them down before Autumn realizes they're missing.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Rising Ninja
programme.desc: The blood moon ritual begins. Ras has everything he needs to free the Forbidden Five. The ninja confronts him and tries to disrupt the ritual; Kai and Bonzle are trapped in the portal, but Lloyd and Arin are there to help.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Shape of Motion
programme.desc: While searching for his parents, Arin and the Ninja rescue a baby dragon, uncovering a new mystery and mission for the team.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Enter the City of Temples
programme.desc: When the Ninja are not invited to the Tournament of Sources, they break into the City of Temples to earn their entry.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: They Gather for the Feast
programme.desc: After earning invitations to the Tournament of Sources, the Ninja attend a banquet for Elemental Masters with friendly faces and old enemies, and Lloyd confronts a familiar face from his vision.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Inside the Maze
programme.desc: Arin continues his investigation into the missing Horns but makes time for Frak, who Sora suspects is working for Ras and Nya's first match pits her against Jay, still with no memory of their past.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: United We Fall
programme.desc: In her match against Cinder, Wyldfyre's temper proves a liability in and out of the arena, and in order to stay in the Tournament, the Ninja invoke an ancient rule that requires them to compete in a race outside of Temple City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Truth and Lies
programme.desc: Arin grapples with Ras's accusation that Master Wu caused the Merge while the Ninja complete the Temple Race and win their way back into the Tournament.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Sword Shatters
programme.desc: Arin follows a lead in his investigation of the missing horns to the Temple City Museum; a tour from Roby reveals a deeper connection between the Tournament and Source Dragons.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Clues and Suspects
programme.desc: Roby and Bleckt visit an injured Lloyd to complete the transfer of Zeatrix's powers as Arin links Bleckt to a clue in his investigation and follows him back to a secret office, where Wyldfyre has an idea to uncover his plans.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Final Game
programme.desc: Arin learns a devastating secret about the Merge and confronts Lloyd as Cole stays behind to protect the dragon horns. Sora faces off against Nokt, and Wyldfyre is too late to stop the manipulation of the games.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Elements of Betrayal
programme.desc: Arin, Zane, and Cole make a shocking discovery in the Monastery of Gates as they defend the Dragon Horns; the depowered Elemental Masters clash with the Wolf Mask army.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja follow a clue to Arin's location but find a new threat, while Nya, Kai and Wyldfyre spark old grudges in their search for Jay.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Arin nurses Ras back to health as they continue his training, meanwhile their trail leads the Ninja into more danger.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Arin ventures into a dangerous new land to heal Ras while Nya and Kai come up with a plan to make Jay come to them.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Zane's search for Arin leads to an old friend but lands him in the middle of the Forbidden Five's hunt for the Prismatic Blades.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja learn of the Forbidden Five's quest to collect the Prismatic Blades, meanwhile Ras finally leads Arin to his parents.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: Islands: Nature's Wild Laboratories
programme.desc: Vancouver Island is the largest island on the west coast of North America; every inch of the island from its mountains to its forests is connected to the sea and every animal has to find a way to fit into that alliance to survive.

programme.title: Islands: Nature's Wild Laboratories
programme.desc: Off the eastern coast of Australia lies K'gari, also known as Fraser Island; it is the largest sand island in the world where every meal is hard won; there's a tropical rainforest on top of the dunes.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall

programme.title: Chasing the Rains

programme.title: Croc and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve gets a first-hand look at what makes Nile crocodiles so deadly and helps a team of scientists relocate a bunch of man-eaters.

programme.title: Croc and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall

programme.title: Croc and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve faces the hippopotamus, his biggest fear; He explains why it is considered Africa's most dangerous species, how humans get its communication signals wrong and explore the link between hippos and whales.

programme.desc: The stickup that started it all! Lupin and Fujiko are both after an ancient artifact Jigen is supposed to protect, while Goemon happens to be searching for his clan's lost treasure nearby. Of course, Inspector Zenigata isn't far behind.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #15: Operation: Return the Treasure
programme.desc: Lupin sets his sights on the legendary Trick Diamond, stolen by his late rival Mark Williams. Instead of finding the diamond, Fujiko relays Mark's dying challenge: return all the other treasures he stole to reveal the location of the gem.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #16: Swallowtail Tatoo
programme.desc: A mysterious criminal captures Lupin and Fujiko with a very specific order: in order to save Fujiko's life, Lupin must infiltrate a high-security museum and steal the Bull's Eye jewel. One little problem: the jewel is cursed to kill anyone who steals it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin's new target is the digital currency gained from the transactions made on this site. Lupin sneaks into a massive high-security server facility, known as the "twin towers". Lupin greets the guard to the key, a young girl and skilled hacker "Ami".

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: "Hunt down the greatest thief of our times, Lupin III!" The Marco Polo executives have set a trap in the form of the Lupin Game. This has people all over the world tracking down Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Shinpei Mayama, the Rat Clan, Union Mama... the all-stars of assassination, from all over the world, suddenly come after Lupin. They're players in a new game started by the executives of Marco Polo: Happy Deathday.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Fujiko smiles deviously as she points her gun at Lupin, when Zenigata arrives to save him and Ami. They get into the inspector's car which takes off, but it's soon attacked by soldiers who are trying to cash in the price on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is shot in the head by a drone fighter. With the death of its target, the Lupin Game is concluded. Time passes, and people forget about the game. Released from his duty of hunting Lupin, Ami now lives with Zenigata, when one day Goemon visits her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: The "Smart Safe" has come to the Greater Tokyo Bank. Lupin is goaded by Fujiko and Jigen to try and crack the technological wonder. What can he do against this peculiarly secure safe?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is hired by Gaston to retrieve a painting, and manages to do so easily enough... except the painting has a strange resemblance to a real Picasso piece, forcing Lupin to examine the truth behind why he was hired.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin visits Gaston's grave. There he meets the elderly Camille, with who he goes out for a drink when the pub's phone begins to ring. On the other end of the line is the supposedly dead Gaston.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is shot, and Albert gets his hands on the notebook. Lupin is saved by Jigen and Goemon and manages to survive his injuries under care. He then explains his past with Albert and how they know each other.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: After learning the shocking truth about Jose's terrifying plot, Lupin heads to Jose's headquarters with Albert, his old thieving comrade. Jigen and Goemon fight off the heaviest opposition while Lupin and Albert head into the heart of the enemy territory.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: To steal the fortune of the Drug King Pablo, the gang heads to South America with Fujiko. As Fujiko distracts the target, Lupin picks off the remains of Pablo's guards while making his way through the jungle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: In a rural town in France, full of cosplayers. Within the town celebrating a pop-cultural event is Goemon. Next to the inn, he decides to keep watch at is Chloé's Bistro. Chloé is exactly the woman Goemon was looking for Lupin's current target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Having enrolled at the Annecy School for Girls, Ami encounters a strange girl in the garden who aims her bow at a crow. The girl is Dolma, the princess of the Kingdom of Padar. Having no friends, Ami finds herself opening up to the odd Dolma.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: "Princess Dolma, please save Padar." With that request, Dolma is taken home. Lupin follows shortly, and Ami decides to accompany Fujiko to Padar in order to save Dolma.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is pierced by Dolma's arrow. Ami and Fujiko take Lupin and escape, hiding in a deserted building. The three of them decide to flee, with Lupin badly injured.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Padar sinks into chaos because of the civil war, but things take a sudden turn when the Shake Hands company gets involved. A proclamation by the king is posted online, proving him to be alive.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: "I want you to find out who killed my husband." Three years ago, someone shot Count Maupassant to death.

programme.desc: Hugo lleva a los bebés a una pastelería, y los bebés deben rescatar a Dil antes de que se convierta en glaseado. Por otro lado, Angélica le dice a Tommy que ser calvo significa que será un bebé para siempre.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés visitan un zoológico interactivo y se convencen de que se convertirán en animales si se quedan allí. Por otro lado, Angélica planea una boda para Lili y Carlitos, pero el matrimonio no es lo que esperaban.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: El abuelo cuenta la historia de las habichuelas mágicas y los bebés creen que Dil tiene poderes tras comérselas. Los bebés piensan que convirtieron a Dil en una sandía.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Dil recibe juguetes viejos de Tommy. Susie es elegida para ser la bailarina principal de la clase de ballet y Angélica se pone celosa.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy y Carlitos deciden tomar caminos separados y hacen nuevos amigos en el parque. Carlitos aprende sobre el arte en un museo.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés visitan un vivero, imaginan que están en la selva y los persigue un tigre, y tratan de salvar a Dil de una terrible enfermedad. Boris y Minka preparan unas vacaciones en una cabaña.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica les cuenta a los bebés una historia de terror en la que ellos son los protagonistas. Carlitos escribe un reclamo a Reptar después de ver un comercial.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos tiene un auto de pedales y se vuelve popular en el parque. Dil escucha música y Tommy se pregunta si puede imaginar escenas en su cabeza.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos se muda al cobertizo del jardín. Los bebés van al baile de graduación organizado por Angélica.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica promete a su madre que no hablará. Carlos piensa que Carlitos ató los cordones de sus zapatos.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés deciden sus futuras carreras. Los bebés construyen un arca cuando Angélica les dice que se producirá una inundación.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica no quiere decir que está enferma para poder ir al circo. Es el momento de introducir a Dil en el mundo de los bebés grandes.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: El abuelo sorprende a todos cuando compite en un torneo de lucha libre. Carlitos comienza a coleccionar piedras.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: La nueva película de Reptar es decepcionante. Los bebés deberán convencer a su héroe para que mejore.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés van al cine y se sorprenden cuando Reptar pasa a ser el malo de la película. Tommy se rehúsa a creer que su héroe se ha vuelto malo y conduce a los bebés a una fantasía que entra a la película en busca de una explicación.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy y Dil pelean por compartir a Firulais. Por eso, los bebés buscan una nueva mascota para Dil. Además, los bebés hacen una elección en la que Tommy y Fili son candidatos.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Anita is ready to dump her husband for her ex-lover. Next Theresa is cheating on her fiancé with his brother! Later Kevin is here to ell his girlfriend's ex, Jermaine, to back off.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Even though Shawn and Gina have been dating for over two months, Shawn has no idea that Gina is really a man. Next, Imani comes clean about her gender to both of her boyfriends!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: John weighs almost 700 pounds and couldn't be happier. HIs girlfriend Kim goes so far as to make him choose between her and a 10-foot long sandwich! He chooses the sandwich.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Mike's wife of 20 years, Beverly, left him 5 months ago and has been living with an "old flame!" Then Christine has been sleeping with her husband's friend! She says he drove her to it since he treats her badly.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Chloe and Dan will tie the knot soon, but she’s finally ready to tell him about her real job. Then Amanda’s mom begs her to quit her job.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tiffany has been cheating with so many people and she's brought them all here today. Next Jimmy has been having an affair with his girlfriend's best friend, Summer. Later Curtis finds out his girlfriend, Sharon, never quit her wild job.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Angelo is here to tell his girlfriend that he's a woman. Next, Mikey brought his girlfriend here to tell her that he's been cheating on her. But she has a surprise of her own. Later Jennifer feels she must tell her lover the truth about her sexuality

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Damien dumps Tanya for her cousin. Melissa fears her boyfriend cheats with her own friend!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Rebecca is here today to demand that her sister, Robin, divorce so that she can marry her man! Next Chrissy is here to tell her boyfriend, John, that she's dumping him for his son! Later Paul wants to dump his pregnant girlfriend for their neighbor!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jen dumps John for Jerry, 73. Danika reveals to her fianc that she's really a man.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Katie's fed up with her brother-in-law Gary's disrespectful behavior. His conduct has landed him in jail, isolated him from his biracial niece, and is now influencing his 5-year-old daughter. Will he change for the better?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: According to Drew, the baby was given gin and died. Shawn, the grieving mother, claims she had no prior knowledge and believes it was tampered with, possibly by her own sister and friend. Who's responsible?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jeanette witnessed her husband John kissing a man named Russell, who was living with them, but John claims that Russell was trying to homewreck. Then Vanessa is desperate to put an end to her boyfriend Robert's constant accusations of cheating.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Dennis claims his ex-girlfriend Kendal keeps tied down with pregnancy lies! He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve’s DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Steve está celebrando otra reunión de chicas adolescentes para tratar los problemas más importantes a los que se pueden enfrentar todas las adolescentes, incluyendo el uso de drogas, el abuso físico y los agresores en Internet.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Marlo tocó a su hija con Sandra cuando ella tenía 7 años? Ha evitado confrontarla durante casi 10 años, pero hoy, Sandra no se irá hasta que no se sepa la verdad y se haga justicia por su hija.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Everett tocó a la hija de su novia Michelle? Su ex Robert dice que su hija de 7 años lo contó. ¡Everett se someterá a una prueba con el detector de mentiras para desmentirlo! ¡No te pierdas estos resultados impactantes!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sheroya tiene 17 años y se esfuerza por criar a 2 niños mientras sale de fiesta sin parar. Su novio Malcolm suele ser infiel y la maltrata verbalmente. Steve tiene mucho trabajo por delante con esta pareja, pero ¿alguno de ellos despertará?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kendra tiene la misión de salvarla de su novio tóxico Chris. A los 17 años, Kendra está embarazada de su sexto hijo. Kendra lo ha intentado casi todo, incluso echarlo de su casa, pero no solamente se defendió, sino que también golpeó a Kendra.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Quién es responsable del bienestar del pequeño Noel? Todo el mundo puede negar las acusaciones, pero alguien sabe qué pasó, y Steve va a obtener explicaciones.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Lainie y Justin tienen un bebé de 9 meses juntos. Justin lastima a Lainie porque cree que ella es infiel. ¿Pero cómo reaccionará Steve cuando se enfrente a Justin?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Buddy pasa sus días fumando y jugando a los videojuegos, en lugar de mantener a su familia. Su novia Holly trabaja para mantenerlos a todos, incluyendo a su hijo que tiene necesidades especiales, ¡pero está harta!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: LaShawna y su novio James sabrán si su amiga Coral lastimó a su hijo hace años. También admitirá que ella le fue infiel con Coral. ¿Cómo reaccionará él cuando descubra otro bombazo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desde que Chris tenía 3 meses, su abuela Anne lo crió y le dijo que su madre Hollie era abusiva y que trató de lastimarlo. Ahora Chris y Hollie se van a conocer por primera vez en nuestro escenario.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Lanikka está harta de los abusos de su novio Malcom. Después, los celos de Tim han destrozado su familia, pero ahora está desesperado por recuperarlos, ¿Tiffany lo dejará definitivamente?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Jennifer se fue de casa para protegerse de su padrastro Allen. 15 años después, su madre quiere una segunda oportunidad, pero Jennifer tiene dudas. ¿Puede Steve ayudar a componer esta familia destruida?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Naomi, de 17 años, ha cambiado repentinamente de actitud y tiene la misión de ser madre. Sus padres, Leeanders y April, necesitan que Steve intervenga.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Tras sobrevivir a una loca persecución en coche, perder la pierna y estar en coma a causa de su esposo, Portia finalmente lo confrontará. No admitirá la culpa, pero hoy Steve está ayudando a Portia a hacerse oír.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda y Eva se ponen de acuerdo para hacerle la vida imposible a Rosaura una vez que llegue a la casa. Panchita se les une. Luis Mario sigue pensando en Camelia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia llama a Luis Mario para oír su voz. Su plan es que cuando se canse de Patricio, volverá con Luis Mario porque sigue siendo su esposo. Luisana está llorando desesperada.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Claudia les dice que ahora menos que nunca cree en Karina, por no querer hacerse la prueba de ir con el chisme de doña Cruz. Samuel está con Claudia y tampoco cree en Karina y María Julia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda llama a Eva para comentarle un nuevo plan contra Rosaura y con la ayuda de Valeria. Valeria acepta provocar a Luis Mario y besarlo para provocar a Rosaura el día de la fiesta.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura le suplica a Luis Mario que no la deje. Pero el está decidido a divorciarse. Gabriel le dice a Panchita que le diga señora a Rosaura y manda a Jimena a calmar los ánimos de Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura está llorando y llama a Luis Mario. Luis Mario regresa con Rosaura, pero como no está piensa que se fue para la casa de su papá. Eduarda le cuenta a Luisana lo que hizo con Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura va a la playa y ve a Luis Mario jugando con Eva. Patricio y Camelia tienen otro altercado. Él la amenaza con su estado de bígama. Rosaura se va llorando para la casa.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le reclama a Rosaura por haber salido con Bruno, pero al final le dice que puede hacerlo porque él confía en ella. Eva le da dos cachetadas a Gabriel porque la besó.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le cuenta a Gabriel la necesidad que tiene de alejarse para siempre de Rosaura para no seguir haciéndole daño porque sabe que no la ama y nunca podrá.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Cuando Rosaura llega al aeropuerto ve a Eva besando a Luis Mario y termina desmayándose en el camino, mientras que Bruno corre como loco por todo el lugar buscándola.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda, ayudada por Panchita, busca el collar de perlas negras con el cual piensa enviar presa a Rosaura, mientras que Luis Mario le escribe una carta a Rosaura, en la cual vuelve a pedirle perdón.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario se niega a considerar la posibilidad de que Rosaura esté esperando un hijo suyo, como le sugiere Gabriel.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda le pide al comisario que le permita ver a Rosaura y cuando está frente a ella la obliga a arrodillarse en su presencia, diciéndole que de esa forma retirará su denuncia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda y Eva esperan que salga Anselmo y lo atropellan con su carro, riendo se alejan de allí. En la cárcel Rosaura se despierta aterrada por una pesadilla, llamando a su padre.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Kin'emon and the others run to Oden Castle to save Oden's family, the castle is set on fire and Kaido attacks Toki and her children.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The day of the Fire Festival has finally come and the whole army is now getting ready to head for Onigashima to raid Kaido!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats and thousands of allies who were supposed to be there are nowhere to be found, but Kin'emon and the others decide to set sail to the stormy sea in a small boat.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Law, and Kid join the Akazaya samurai and begin to fight Kaido's army. The three rivals from the Worst Generation compete with each other as they attack the enemy fleet with their ultimate skills.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Akazaya members are surprised by help from their old mate and Kin'emon notices he made a big mistake which has luckily saved all his allies. As their battle against Kaido's army heats up, the cornered Kanjuro makes a stunning move.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Swept away by Kanjuro, Momonosuke remembers his father, tries to rise above his fear, and speak to his allies. Luffy and the others start heading for Onigashima, but Kaido's army gets in their way again with a formidable weapon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the rest of the Straw Hat crew are excited to see Jimbei again and welcome him as a new member. Meanwhile, Law and the Akazaya members strategize on how to enter Onigashima and attack Kaido.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: To Law and the others' surprise, Luffy and the rest of the Straw Hats attack the giant torii gate in front of Onigashima. Meanwhile, Kaido and Orochi are having a big banquet on the island where Kaido's formidable subordinates are also called in.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats and the samurai warriors finally reach Onigashima! Before they set out for the castle as they planned, the samurai warriors use surprising but determined tactics to cut off their retreat which leave the Straw Hats in shock.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Eustass Kid and his clan start heading for Kaido's castle head on waving Luffy off. Luffy and Zoro go after them to stop them from causing trouble, but they happen to step into Kaido's banquet.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Zoro each witness Kaido's subordinates waste food at the banquet and make fun of the poor people in the Land of Wano. Thinking of Otama, a small girl who liked red-bean soup so much, both Luffy and Zoro become infuriated and create turmoil.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After making a scene at the Golden Festival, Luffy and Zoro try to get away, but Queen announces his subordinates that anyone who catches them will be rewarded with a position in the Tobi Roppo.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Haccha, a supergiant Number, joins in and the pursuit of Luffy and the others becomes even more intense!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Law, Kin'emon, and all the others are trying to infiltrate Kaido's castle from all sides. Meanwhile, Big Mom's children are climbing up the waterfall towards Onigashima, but this time, Marco the Phoenix appears from nowhere and stands in their way!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The furious Big Mom chases Brachio Tank driven by Chopper and Usopp, but they bravely fight back!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy runs into Ulti and Page One, members of the Tobi Roppo from the Animal Kingdom Pirates. Hearing that he aims to become the King of the Pirates, the brother and sister duo become infuriated and turn themselves into massive beasts.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Evading Ulti and Page One, strong members of the Tobi Roppo, Luffy tries to find out what Kaido's son Yamato's motive is. However, the two get in a fight. Taking Luffy's punishing attacks, Yamato remembers someone he fought against in the past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Akazaya members who were on board Law's Polar Tang finally reach Onigashima and see someone who they didn't expect. Kaido's son Yamato starts telling his story to Luffy, shares his passion, and reveals what's behind his mask!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: At the back entrance of Onigashima, the Akazaya members try to get inside the gate, but they're blocked by their former colleague Kanjuro.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kaido's plan to obtain the great treasure infuriates Orochi, but his unexpected violent move silences everyone. Meanwhile at the back entrance of Onigashima, Kikunojo squares off against Kanjuro and gets into an emotional fight with her former colleague.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Akazaya members start charging towards Kaido from the back of Onigashima. Meanwhile, at the Performance Floor, Kaido closes in on Momonosuke shivering in terror and asks him the ultimate question which will determine his fate.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Akazaya members deliver a crushing blow to Kaido. Luffy and Yamato try to back them up, but Ulti stands in their way and Big Mom spots Luffy. Meanwhile, Nami and Carrot free themselves from their enemies and move on to take back Zeus!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Animal Kingdom Pirates gasp with surprise to see thousands of samurai warriors coming into the castle. In his dragon form, Kaido goes outside to fight the Akazaya members under the moon/

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shinobu tries to rescue the weakened Momonosuke but is found by King and attacked. On the other hand, Nami takes back Zeus from Big Mom and runs away but loses him again and gets chased by Zeus who is ordered to kill to her by Big Mom.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky faces Big Mom with the help of Robin and Jimbei, but the Numbers come interrupting their battle. One of them holds Brachio Tank with Usopp and Chopper inside in his hand. Meanwhile, Yamato finally meets his son Momonosuke.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Minks struggle with a poor hand against the Gifters, Kin'emon tries to assist them, but Dogstorm and Cat Viper stop him and start fighting for the other Minks!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Who's-Who invites Drake and Hawkins to a plot to kill Queen. Meanwhile, the Straw Hats are facing two large monsters that remind them of the Giant who they once struggled to take down. As Luffy charges towards them, someone unexpected comes in to help.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will suffers from amnesia after his near-death experience; visitors are intent on finding out what is in his memory.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus and the team go to a bank to retrieve an Abnormal that was stashed in a safe deposit box, which not only hatched prematurely but also escaped, prompting Kate to enforce a less-than-subtle quarantine of the bank's customers.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: An amoralist's plan to steal a fortune in gold from Zo'or (Anita La Selva) puts Augur's (Richard Chevolleau) life in jeopardy.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: The discovery of a deadly parasite, believed to be extinct, threatens an amnesty for all Resistance members, which has been negotiated by the Atlantic National Alliance.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Chaos erupts when the Taelons decide to abandon Earth in the face of imminent Jaridian invasion.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 1
programme.desc: On the way to Luxor, Joseph notices an electrical outlet set in a rock. Fascinated by the rare sight, Joseph goes in for a closer look and gets shocked. Though he seems fine afterward, soon all manner of small accidents begin to occur around him.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 2
programme.desc: Due to the powers of an enemy Stand, Joseph's body becomes magnetized. While chasing after the woman he suspects is the Stand user, Joseph learns that Avdol has also become magnetized from touching a different electrical outlet.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 1
programme.desc: With Joseph and Avdol busy fighting Mariah, Jotaro and Polnareff get concerned about why they haven't shown up yet. As the two search Luxor, Polnareff senses someone following them and confronts the man.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 2
programme.desc: The power of Alessi's Stand "Set" has turned Polnareff back into a child, leaving him confused and alone. A passerby named Marena takes the boy into her home to help him, but they are followed by Alessi and his terrible powers.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 1
programme.desc: After a long journey, Jotaro and his friends finally reach Cairo. They begin asking about the location of DIO's palace and find one man who says he has information, but will only answer if the group can beat him in a game.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 2
programme.desc: After losing to D'Arby, Joseph and Polnareff have their souls taken. In order to have their souls returned, Jotaro shows off Star Platinum's powers before beginning a match with D'Arby, warning him that cheating won't work.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hol Horse and Mondatta, Part 1
programme.desc: Hol Horse arrives at Cairo in order to pursue Jotaro and the others. He has joined forces with another partner and is after the lives of Jotaro and crew once more. What's more, his new partner is none other than Mondatta.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hol Horse and Mondatta, Part 2
programme.desc: Following Mondatta's prediction, Hol Horse sticks his fingers into Polnareff's nose, but he doesn't know what to do from there. Making matters worse, Jotaro and the others show up in search of Polnareff, forcing Hol Horse into a tough spot.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Guardian of Hell, Pet Shop, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and his friends continue to search for DIO's mansion in Cairo. Following Avdol's advice, they have a beggar look for the mansion and wait. Meanwhile, Iggy, wandering the city alone, is confronted by two large dogs.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Guardian of Hell, Pet Shop, Part 2
programme.desc: Iggy ends up in a battle to the death in the sewers against Pet Shop, the falcon that guards DIO's mansion. Despite being injured, Iggy runs to the river in an attempt to escape, but he may have underestimated Pet Shop's abilities.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Player, Part 1
programme.desc: Though purchased dearly with Iggy's injury, Jotaro and his group finally have the location of DIO's palace. Waiting for them where they find the butler, Darby Younger, brother of the gambler they previously defeated.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Player, Part 2
programme.desc: The battle for souls with D'Arby continues. Kakyoin challenges D'Arby to a racing game but ends up losing both the race and his soul. Before Joseph really has time to react, Jotaro picks the next game.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Miasma of the Void, Cool Ice, Part 1
programme.desc: The baseball game with D'Arby continues within DIO's mansion. For some reason, Jotaro starts telling D'Arby what pitches he'll be throwing. D'Arby finds Jotaro's actions strange, but still believes he has the upper hand because of his Stand's abilities.

programme.desc: When a trucker is gunned down after a routine trip from Canada, all signs point the team to a noted criminal on the FBI's Most Wanted Terrorists list. Also, Jubal gets to work with an old friend and colleague, Detective Jack Lombardo.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A drug dealer is shot in a federal park and the team sets out to look for his killer; Maggie's sister returns to New York and complicates the case.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: All eyes are on the team when they try to find out who kidnapped the only child of a prominent U.S senator. The abduction also uncovers a potential link to a similar case that was pushed to the side by local authorities.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After finding a group of teens dead from a drug overdose, the team races to find the dangerous dealer and his supplier. Meanwhile, OA questions where he stands in his faith.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a prominent doctor is found dead in a ritualistic slaying, the team must race against time to hunt down a religiously motivated serial killer. Also, Scola (John Boyd) faces a life-or-death decision.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a bus explosion kills several innocent people, the team jumps into action to take down the responsible terrorist organization.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger

programme.title: Kiss the Girls

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: Mitch joins a prosperous Memphis firm that affords Mitch and his wife an affluent lifestyle beyond their wildest dreams. But when FBI agents confront him with evidence of corruption and murder within the firm, Mitch sets out to find the truth.

programme.title: Hollywood Homicide
programme.desc: A pair of detectives investigate a murder while pursuing their other full-time professions. Welcome to Hollywood Homicide - the only place where you can come to work hungry, horny, thirsty, and broke, and resolve all four by the end of the watch.

programme.title: American Hustle
programme.desc: The con is on when scam artists and lovers Irving Rosenfeld and Sydney Prosser are entrapped by ambitious FBI agent Richie DiMaso and coerced into participating in a sting operation that hinges on snaring politician Carmine Polito and his associates.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: In this thrilling cult classic, two dangerous outlaw brothers head out on a wild crime spree. After kidnapping a father and his two kids, the bad guys head to a seedy Mexican bar for safety but come face to face with blood-sucking vampires.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 2: Texas Blood Money
programme.desc: When a gang of bank robbers makes a run for the border, they wander into the wrong bar and mess with the wrong vampires. It's kill-or-be-killed in the ultimate battle to stop these evil creatures and save their own lives!

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 3: Hangman's Daughter
programme.desc: Set in Mexico in the early 1900s, this prequel to the From Dusk Till Dawn series finds outlaw Johnny Madrid on the run from the hangman, with the hangman's daughter Esmeralda by his side. Together they are faced with the fight of their lives.

programme.title: Go

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
